comment: C3 has the largest battery and highest range potential while C1 is limited
C1 benefits from lower mass and speed while C3 has higher mass and braking demand
C1 is the lightest concept and C3 is the heaviest
C3 has the highest motor power while C1 is limited for broader urban use
C1 is simplest while C3 is more complex
C3 supports higher-speed urban operation while C1 is more campus-focused
C2 is used as the balanced reference concept
